TAX AND REVENUE
SOLUTIONS 
Leveraging ICT for Tax Compliance and Trade Facilitation


Techno Brain is a Global leader in next-generation digital solutions, services and consulting Company with operations in 
Africa, USA, India, UK and UAE. Appraised at CMMI Level 5, Techno Brain is committed to deliver high quality, cost effective 
and off-the-shelf solutions to Governments, NGOs and Private organizations across the globe.

Integrated Tax 
Administration 
Systemresources to fund public services and other investments key to future 
compliance through citizen-centric services and transparent 
processes.
We take account of the factors shaping revenue performance such as 
globalisation, large informal sectors and neighbouring country policies and we strive to resolve fraud and resulting revenue shortfalls through enhanced internal controls.
by enhancing the interface and integration of revenue related agencies.
Whether they are factors relating to revising tax codes, simplifying 
the process of paying taxes, or other business priorities, trips™ deliver 
value and sustainable change.• Better service delivery to taxpayers leading to 
Revenue growth
• Improved risk management and control
• Greater transparency leading to increased 
taxpayer compliance
• Attainment of international and regional
procedures
• Better investment climate leading to 
increased inward investment
• Improved ability to monitor activity for
national security purposes

With RevenueACA, a number of integrations and system components will enable the desired outcome of enhanced revenue 
collection.
These include:
• Integration to modern Payment Platform
• Implementation of the Revenue and Citizen Portal 
• Implementation and GIS Solution along the Property and Revenue modules 
• Deployment of Business Intelligence and Reporting Tools
• Integrating the solution to an existing ERP
Multiple commercial banks now have the latest technology in the electronic payments space in Africa and partnering with the 
banks to channel revenue collected at various sources while simplifying the experience for the modern taxpayer is key. Using 
electronic payments is a sure way to curb pilferage in the collections process and also ensures closer monitoring of collections in 
real time. 
The Citizen Portal module will ensure taxpayers conveniently access various services. Among the benefits here will be increased 
transparency with users also able to privately view their accounts, perform transactions and subsequently a higher compliance in 
payments, permit renewals and increased confidence in local governments.

The reporting dashboard will allow the 
administration to view up to the minute 
statistics such as;• Collections Today
• Collections this Month
• Number of Property Renewals Due
• Property Renewals Overdue
• Overdue by Revenue Category
• Revenue Budget against actual 
collections
• Revenue collected per zone/area/
market
• Debtors aging reports• Customer reports
• Transaction reports
• Revenue Collection reports
• Revenue Summary reports
• Revenue Forecast reports
• Reconciliation (Cash/Bank) reports
• System Audit reports

Import / Export Commodity Database System
(IECDB)
The objective of Import/Export Commodity Database (ICDB/ECDB) system is to develop an Import/Export 
Commodity Database on the national level in electronic format based on actual Imports/Exports, analyze the 
data arriving at unit values and compute the deviation of identical goods and to identify outliers where the 
Import/Export prices are out of range from a predetermined norm. 
•  Importers & Exporters Raw Data Loading.
•  Importers & Exporters Data Analysis.
•  Calculating Analyzed Value.
•  Detecting Outliers.
•  Reports Generation.
•  Display Graphs.
•  Search and Retrieve facility to display analyzed data.
